title: pelargonium bellermannii
intro: Pelargonium bellermannii, also known as the Red Form or Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the Geraniaceae family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to its high concentration of geraniol and other compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium bellermannii include reducing fever, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
